replies.subject: Re: German tenders — LED & containers
replies.replyText: Yes, this sounds interesting. We'd be happy to talk — please propose a time for a call.

replies.subject: Re: German tenders — LED & containers
replies.replyText: Maybe. Could you send us more information first before we decide?

replies.subject: Re: German tenders — LED & containers
replies.replyText: Please remove us from your list and do not contact us again.

replies.subject: Re: German tenders
replies.replyText: Who are you and why are you emailing me?
